audit_items.proof_trace: ExpandMirrorKernelInfo calls CloneKernelInfo which can return NULL on memory allocation failure, but fails to check the return value before passing it to RotateKernelInfo, which will dereference the NULL pointer.
audit_items.attack_scenario: A user provides a kernel with the '<' expansion flag, and under low memory conditions CloneKernelInfo returns NULL, causing RotateKernelInfo to dereference NULL and crash.
